howItWorks.title: How Bellona <highlight>Works</highlight>
howItWorks.description: A proven five-step framework from audit to optimization — deployed in <time>weeks, not months</time>.

1.title: Audit
1.description: We map your operations, identify bottlenecks, and pinpoint the highest-ROI automation opportunities.

2.title: Design
2.description: Our architects blueprint custom AI workflows, agent behaviors, and integration paths for your stack.

3.title: Build
3.description: We engineer your automation systems with rigorous testing and zero disruption to daily operations.

4.title: Deploy
4.description: Systems go live integrated with your existing tools — fully operational from day one.

5.title: Optimize
5.description: Continuous monitoring, performance tuning, and scaling as your business evolves.

architecture.title: From Lead to <highlight>Revenue</highlight>
architecture.description: Every Bellona deployment follows a unified intelligence pipeline — connecting <accent>acquisition</accent>, automation, and revenue in one seamless flow.

faq.title: Common <highlight>Questions</highlight>
faq.description: Everything you need to know before building your <accent>AI workforce</accent>.

items.q: What types of businesses does Bellona work with?
items.a: Growth-stage companies across finance, e-commerce, real estate, healthcare, consulting, and education. If your business has repeatable processes, we can automate them.
Most systems go live within 2–4 weeks. Simple automations deploy in days; complex multi-agent systems take 4–6 weeks.
No. We build intuitive dashboards and provide full training. Your team uses simple interfaces while AI handles the complexity.

items.q: What platforms do you integrate with?
items.a: 200+ platforms including Salesforce, HubSpot, Slack, n8n, Make, Zapier, and any tool with an API or webhook.

items.q: How is Bellona different from hiring?
items.a: Traditional hiring adds headcount and overhead. Bellona builds self-running AI systems that scale infinitely without additional payroll.
Clients typically see 40% cost reduction and 65% improvement in key metrics within 90 days. We project ROI during the audit phase.
Yes. Every engagement includes monitoring, optimization, and scaling support. Your systems evolve with your business.
Book a free audit. We assess your operations and show exactly where AI delivers the highest impact.

finalCta.description: Join companies using Bellona to build <accent>AI workforces</accent> that operate around the clock.
